title: LICHEN test vector file
description: Envelope shared by all LICHEN vector files. Each file holds a list of vectors of one kind; see the per-vector definitions.

hex.description: Lowercase hex-encoded byte string (may be empty).

compressed.description: SCHC output: leading rule-id byte + residue + tail.

encoded.description: Announce app_data Type=0x01 bytes: type + signed big-endian lat_e7 + signed big-endian lon_e7.

body.description: Payload bytes after the dispatch byte.

wrapped.description: Authenticated link inner payload: dispatch byte + body.

encoded.description: On-air frame bytes, including malformed negative test inputs.

oscore_vector.description: OSCORE (RFC 8613) test vector for key derivation, request/response protection, replay detection, or invalid input.

type.description: Message or option type being tested

fields.description: Decoded message fields (structure varies by type)
